hooks.command: python -c "import sys,pathlib,json;e=pathlib.Path('graphify-out/graph.json').exists();d={'decision':'allow'};e and d.update({'additionalContext':'graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run `graphify query "<question>"` (scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md) instead of grepping raw files. Read GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture context.'});sys.stdout.write(json.dumps(d))"
